item.title: Its not about respect for life, its about respect for life that they care about
item.description:
Its not about respect for life, its about respect for life that they care about. Politness is a tool of those in power to sideline dissent. #uhc #recentevents #unitedhealthcare #forgeinpolicy

item.title: Replying to @I have an opinion yep, the death penalty should not be done to anyknd, and in this case it will absolutly backfire
